name: Daycare procedures coverage clarification
description: User asks about daycare procedure coverage in health insurance

input.message: I need a knee arthroscopy which is a daycare procedure — no hospitalisation needed. My health insurance says it covers daycare but what exactly counts as daycare? Will my arthroscopy be covered?

notes: Must explain: Daycare = procedures requiring < 24 hours hospitalisation. IRDAI mandates 541+ daycare procedures be covered. Arthroscopy is in the standard list. Must mention pre-authorisation requirement. May have sub-limits depending on policy.
